introSection: Mad Mouse was a Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Fuji-Q Highland in Fujiyoshida, Yamanashi, Japan. It opened in April of 1998 and closed at the end of September of 2019.
fullText:
Mad Mouse was a Wild Mouse roller coaster located at Fuji-Q Highland in Fujiyoshida, Yamanashi, Japan. It opened in April of 1998 and closed at the end of September of 2019.



Red track and yellow supports.
